/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/distortion_plugin.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libdistortion_plugin.so -o libdistortion_plugin.so CMakeFiles/distortion_plugin.dir/distortion_plugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/distortion_plugin.dir/distortion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/distortion_plugin.dir/distortion_plugin.cpp.o  ../../src/libopenamp-dsp.a
